description_long: This is a military-style single-propeller airplane with a dark green fuselage, featuring a distinctive shark mouth nose art and a red spinner at the front. The wings are straight and low-mounted, each bearing a blue and white roundel insignia. The tail section is adorned with blue and white stripes and the number '88' is prominently displayed on the rear fuselage. The cockpit is enclosed and positioned forward on the fuselage, with a clear canopy. The landing gear is of the taildragger type, with two main wheels under the wings and a smaller tail wheel. The overall design is reminiscent of World War II fighter aircraft, with a robust metal construction and detailed surface markings.
description: A dark green, single-propeller military airplane with shark mouth nose art, blue insignia, and a red spinner, featuring a low-mounted straight wing and taildragger landing gear.
description_view_0: Front view showing the red spinner, propeller, and symmetrical low-mounted wings with blue insignia.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the shark mouth nose art, cockpit canopy, '88' marking, and striped tail.
description_view_2: Top-down view displaying the full wingspan, blue insignia on both wings, and the streamlined fuselage.
description_view_3: Right side view mirroring the left, with visible nose art, cockpit, and tail markings.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, straight wings with slight dihedral and no winglets; roundel insignia on each wing.
attribute_engine_type: Single nose-mounted piston engine with a two-blade propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers; tail features blue and white stripes.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Taildragger configuration with two main fixed wheels and a single tail wheel.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a clear canopy integrated into the fuselage.
